---
title: "Página 1 — Acceso e Indicadores Laborales"
subtitle: "EQUILAB · DAT4CCIÓN 2026"
date: today
lang: es
format:
  dashboard:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## 
```{r}
library(arrow)     
library(dplyr)      
library(ggplot2)    
library(plotly)    
library(Hmisc)      
```

```{r}
df_pet <- read_parquet("../datos/geih_pet_2019_2025.parquet")

glimpse(df_pet)

```

```{r}
df_base <- df_pet |>
  filter(
    sexo %in% c(1, 2),    
    edad >= 15,            
    edad <= 99             
  )
```
